title: Enderite Reimagined
description: A new gear, tools, and weapons, made of the most powerful material; Enderite!
body:
This new armor set is approximately one-third more powerful than netherite.
To obtain this powerful armor set, you must follow the crafting instructions below:

### **Crafting and smelting**

![Raw enderite crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6a645dd8abf1407d2da85aacb1c281c5b53ba73.png)

Then, to turn it into an ingot, you must burn it in a smelting furnace. (Warning: it takes 30 seconds to melt each piece!)

![Enderite smelting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c74d5803114e71db35d83f65e46e939a4621af7c.png)

Once you have the ingot, you must use it to upgrade your weapons, tools, and armor at a smithing table. (Requires dragon breath.)

## **Smithing**

![Enderite sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa8436363a55f59975a33187cd0fcbe512703d12.png)   ![Enderite axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10759fc8d2c27c98c34f2f0c4d1cc207527ea179.png) 

![Enderite pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c669ce9454b137d14089fb8675ea70aa77803ee2.png)   ![Enderite shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de3b04ef72319d7a41290c8064a7e16c452844c.png)

¡Armor time!

![Enderite chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16a04ca7ef99b3fa03d4a20064c4894bd94000ae.png)   ![Enderite leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b94c48e70601f2ea62ecfce2f07b940169deebf4.png)   ![Enderite boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed6ca25226f8d93b32ad5f9ccb77c92dc69524bf.png)
![Enderite helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae62a6d1e658c0705e171afc37bc5b87af4bfd59.png)

The full Enderite armor will grant you a whole new heart bar, increased jump power, and increased movement speed.

This is what a full enderite gear looks like:

![Full enderite gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3da3ef0909b050552f01f761be833b997244f61.png)

# **New weapons!**

## **Enderite scythe**

This new weapon sweeps like a sword, but has two blocks more range, a higher percentage of damage per entity damaged, and a whopping 15 damage! That translates to almost 20 damage on a crit.
It's smithing recipe is simple:

![Enderite scythe crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9634b589fec9ce96e0f5c14fd4c982d99e054ba2.png)

![Using the Enderite Scythe](https://i.imgflip.com/9zhaip.gif)

![Enderite scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3722dbd29da4ee394374943805c4bb246200d2a7_0.webp)


## **Enderite shield**

This new shield quadruples the durability of a normal shield. And it looks cool!!
It's Smithing recipe is:

![Enderite shield recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1af758f4dbfb2aaccdf1f88a7bcf6157e800306.png)

![Enderiteshield1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/210f3e1fc327321e7c7b5b453ea39b64fb72e1cf.png)![Enderite shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/164ba765ca5c6442bd5fd43967abd3a02948106e.png)

## **Enderite bow**

The Enderite Bow quadruples the durability of a normal bow, and grants you super jump when held, allowing you to reach farther targets, or escape in critical moments.

Smithing recipe:

![Enderite bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e464801425a0170f20feafad44ad032c0fc9dfe2.png)

![Enderite bow + armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91ad419d82a1f3639aa0a282e80329150d5ab8a1.png)![Enderite bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc84129e358458f9329d9b0646aa769f056a428a.png)![Using the enderite bow](https://i.imgflip.com/9zhc47.gif)

# **CREDITS**
I made the entire datapack and texture pack by myself, but it wouldn't have been possible if it weren't for these good people who helped me.
